basic_details.job_title: MPRDC Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 18 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: M.P. Road Development Corporation Ltd. (MPRDC), a Govt. of M.P. Undertaking
basic_details.total_vacancies: 10 (Open category), including 8 posts under the Female sub-column
basic_details.short_information: M.P. Road Development Corporation Ltd. (MPRDC), a wholly owned company of the Government of Madhya Pradesh responsible for State Highways and other infrastructure development projects, has invited applications from eligible candidates for the post of Manager (Technical). The advertisement (No. MPRDC/377/HR/26, dated July 2026) covers 10 regular posts at Pay Level-12, with selection to be made purely on the basis of a valid one-year GATE score. Applications must be submitted online through www.mponline.gov.in. This article covers the vacancy breakup, pay scale, selection criteria, and general t

important_dates.advertisement date: 15.07.2026 (as per digital signature on the notification)

qualification.details: The notification does not specify a detailed educational qualification table for the Manager (Technical) post. Selection is based purely on a valid GATE score, which implicitly requires the qualifying GATE-eligible educational background; candidates should refer to the official notification and any addendum published on the MPRDC or MP Online website for the exact qualification requirement.MPRDC Manager (Technical) Salary / Pay Scale

selection_process: Selection for the Manager (Technical) post will be made purely on the basis of a valid one-year GATE-2024
or GATE-2026 score. No written examination or interview process is mentioned in this notification.
how_to_apply: Visit the official application portal: www.mponline.gov.in. Applications will not be accepted through any other mode.
Locate the MPRDC Manager (Technical) recruitment application link once it is activated on the portal.
Fill in the required personal, educational, and GATE score details in the online application form.
Submit the application before the last date, once it is published by MPRDC/MP Online.
Regularly check www.mprdc.gov.in and www.mponline.gov.in for updates, addendums, and corrigenda related to this recruitment.

10 (Open category), including 8 posts under the Female sub-column

content_sections.heading: MPRDC Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: The notification does not specify the online application start date or the last date to apply. As per the general terms, the last date for submission of application will be published only after confirmation of key dates from MP Online.

rows.date: 15.07.2026 (as per digital signature on the notification)

content_sections.heading: MPRDC Manager (Technical) Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: The vacancy table in the notification lists posts under an "Open" column and a "Female" column, category-wise, as reproduced below exactly as given in the source. Reservation for Persons with Disabilities (Divyangjan): A total of 1 post is reserved for Divyangjan candidates with blindness or low vision. The category of the selected Divyangjan candidate will be counted against their respective category. This post is included within the total vacant posts of each category/open post, and is not an additional post over and above the numbers shown in the table.

content_sections.heading: MPRDC Manager (Technical) Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: The notification does not specify a detailed educational qualification table for the Manager (Technical) post. Selection is based purely on a valid GATE score, which implicitly requires the qualifying GATE-eligible educational background; candidates should refer to the official notification and any addendum published on the MPRDC or MP Online website for the exact qualification requirement.MPRDC Manager (Technical) Salary / Pay Scale

content_sections.heading: MPRDC Manager (Technical) Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Selection for the Manager (Technical) post will be made purely on the basis of a valid one-year GATE-2024, GATE-2025, or GATE-2026 score. No written examination or interview process is mentioned in this notification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for MPRDC Manager (Technical) Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official application portal: www.mponline.gov.in . Applications will not be accepted through any other mode. Locate the MPRDC Manager (Technical) recruitment application link once it is activated on the portal. Fill in the required personal, educational, and GATE score details in the online application form. Submit the application before the last date, once it is published by MPRDC/MP Online. Regularly check www.mprdc.gov.in and www.mponline.gov.in for updates, addendums, and corrigenda related to this recruitment.

content_sections.heading: MPRDC Recruitment 2026: General Terms and Conditions
content_sections.text: All applications must be submitted through www.mponline.gov.in only. Selection will be made on the basis of a valid one-year GATE-2024/2025/2026 score. The Managing Director, MPRDC, reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of positions advertised, based on the actual requirement, and to fill or not fill posts from the merit/waiting list. MPRDC also reserves the right not to declare any waiting list. The Managing Director, MPRDC, has full right to accept or reject any or all applications without assigning any reason. The last date for submission of application, and other related details, will be published only after confirmation of key dates from MP Online. All future addendums, corrigenda, or clarifications regarding this recruitment will be uploaded only on www.mprdc.gov.in or www.mponline.gov.in.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in MPRDC Manager (Technical) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 10 posts under the Open column, spread across UR, OBC, SC, ST, and UR (PH) categories, with 8 posts shown under the Female sub-column of the vacancy table.

faq.question: Q2. What is the selection process for MPRDC Manager (Technical) post?
faq.answer: Selection is made purely on the basis of a valid one-year GATE-2024, GATE-2025, or GATE-2026 score. No separate written exam or interview is mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the pay scale for MPRDC Manager (Technical)?
faq.answer: The pay scale is ₹56,100 to ₹1,77,500, corresponding to Pay Level-12.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for MPRDC Manager (Technical) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online only through www.mponline.gov.in. No other mode of application is accepted.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any reservation for Persons with Disabilities in MPRDC Manager (Technical) Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes. One post is reserved for Divyangjan candidates with blindness or low vision. This post is counted within the respective category's total vacancies and is not an additional post.
